pageContext.name: Die-Cut Hyakki Yagyo
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM present the Die-Cut Hyakki Yagyo Unpainted Model Kit!  This statue by Masato Ohata x Manas S+U+M stands approximately 15' tall and is made of ivory and transparent resin. It is unpainted so you can transform it into your own unique version.  Don't miss your chance to grab this unpainted statue kit today!
